description: Ultra Fantasy Cup team leading Turtonator with Empoleon as the intended safe swap and XL Slurpuff as the anti-meta closer. Slurpuff runs Fairy Wind with Energy Ball and Flamethrower for surprise coverage (over the standard Play Rough) to catch steels and fairies off guard.
performanceNotes: Slurpuff's underrated attack stat wins unexpected CMP ties and lands double super-effective Flamethrower snipes on steels/fortress-types
Empoleon hard-walls Primarina energy and stores Hydro Cannons for cleanup
Turtonator's banked Overheat plus Slurpuff's stored Flamethrower enable strong combo/closing pressure

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: XL Slurpuff is secretly AMAZING in this meta!

description: Forretress leads to debuff opponents with Sand Tomb/Rock Tomb, then pivots to Primarina for Waterfall/Chilling Water pressure, with Florges as the closer checking dragons. Same Fantasy Cup team the creator ran in Great League but with Florges swapped in over his prior pick for Fairy/Water coverage.
performanceNotes: Climbed so high the creator couldn't find opponents to queue against in Fantasy Cup Ultra League
Forretress hard-walls steel/ground threats and can solo multiple Pokemon by perma-debuffing
Primarina is very safe with almost nothing walling it; Florges reliably checks most dragons outside Origin Giratina/Tornadus

sources.author: CalebPeng
sources.videoTitle: I'm the HIGHEST RANKED Fantasy Cup player???
